response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and systems engineering skills with exposure to event-driven architectures and developer tooling, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI systems, fintech infrastructure, or executive leadership at scale-ups. His background is more aligned with software craftsmanship and open-source contributions than the specialized AI-driven fintech requirements of this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience with diverse languages and frameworks, including contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators).
Proven track record in building and scaling event-driven, distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media).
Experience with developer tooling, testing frameworks, and open-source projects, indicating a focus on reliability and observability.
concerns: No explicit experience building or operating multi-agent AI systems in production, a hard requirement for the role.
Limited fintech-specific experience (e.g., credit systems, real-time risk modeling, or regulatory compliance).
No demonstrated executive leadership in scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or governance of hybrid engineering models.
